name: Chocolate-Dipped Strawberries-New Orleans Jazz & Heritage
recipeIngredient: Look for chocolate labeled as "couverture" chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the strawberries well and do not remove stems.
2. Spread the berries on towels or absorbent paper in a single layer and allow to air dry until all water has evaporated. Chocolate will not adhere properly if the berries are damp.
3. Melt 1/2 pound chocolate in a double boiler deep enough to cover strawberries.
4. Holding the berries by the stem, hand dip each one three-quarters of the way up to the top.
5. Place on waxed paper and allow to harden or refrigerate until hard.
6. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
